video.frei0r.posterize

Posterizes image by reducing the number of colors used in image (by Janne Liljeblad).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?levels : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • levels (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.104166666667): Number of values per channel.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

video.frei0r.pr0be

Measure video values (by Marko Cebokli).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?_256_scale : bool, ?big_window : bool,
 ?measurement : {float}, ?show_alpha : bool,
 ?x : {float}, ?x_size : {float}, ?y : {float},
 ?y_size : {float}, source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b),
 midi='c)) -> source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b),
midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • _256_scale (of type bool, which defaults to false): use 0-255 instead of 0.0-1.0.
  • big_window (of type bool, which defaults to false): Display more data.
  • measurement (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): What measurement to display.
  • show_alpha (of type bool, which defaults to false): Display alpha value too.
  • x (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): X position of probe.
  • x_size (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.25): X size of probe.
  • y (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Y position of probe.
  • y_size (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.25): Y size of probe.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

video.frei0r.pr0file

2D video oscilloscope (by Marko Cebokli).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?_256_scale : bool, ?alpha_trace : bool,
 ?b_trace : bool, ?channel : {float}, ?color : {float},
 ?crosshair_color : {float}, ?display_average : bool,
 ?display_maximum : bool, ?display_minimum : bool,
 ?display_rms : bool, ?g_trace : bool, ?length : {float},
 ?marker_1 : {float}, ?marker_2 : {float},
 ?pb_trace : bool, ?pr_trace : bool, ?r_trace : bool,
 ?tilt : {float}, ?x : {float}, ?y : {float},
 ?y_trace : bool, source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b),
 midi='c)) -> source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b),
midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • _256_scale (of type bool, which defaults to false): use 0-255 instead of 0.0-1.0.
  • alpha_trace (of type bool, which defaults to false): Show Alpha trace on scope.
  • b_trace (of type bool, which defaults to true): Show B trace on scope.
  • channel (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.375004708767): Channel to numerically display.
  • color (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): rec 601 or rec 709.
  • crosshair_color (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Color of the profile marker.
  • display_average (of type bool, which defaults to true): e.
  • display_maximum (of type bool, which defaults to false): .
  • display_minimum (of type bool, which defaults to false): .
  • display_rms (of type bool, which defaults to true): .
  • g_trace (of type bool, which defaults to true): Show G trace on scope.
  • length (of type {float}, which defaults to 1.61173498631): Length of profile.
  • marker_1 (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Position of marker 1.
  • marker_2 (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Position of marker 2.
  • pb_trace (of type bool, which defaults to false): Show Pb trace on scope.
  • pr_trace (of type bool, which defaults to false): Show Pr trace on scope.
  • r_trace (of type bool, which defaults to true): Show R trace on scope.
  • tilt (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Tilt of profile.
  • x (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): X position of profile.
  • y (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Y position of profile.
  • y_trace (of type bool, which defaults to false): Show Y’ trace on scope.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

Reduce image to primary colors (by Hedde Bosman).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?factor : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

Displays a histogram of R, G and B of the video-data (by Albert Frisch).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?mix : {float}, ?overlay_sides : bool,
 source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) ->
source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • mix (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): The amount of source image mixed into background of display.

video.frei0r.screen

Perform an RGB[A] screen operation between the pixel sources, using the generalised algorithm: D = 255 - (255 - A) * (255 - B) (by Jean-Sebastien Senecal).

video.frei0r.sop_sat

Slope/Offset/Power and Saturation color corrections according to the ASC CDL (Color Decision List) (by Simon A. Eugster (Granjow)).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?aoffset : {float}, ?apower : {float},
 ?aslope : {float}, ?boffset : {float},
 ?bpower : {float}, ?bslope : {float},
 ?goffset : {float}, ?gpower : {float},
 ?gslope : {float}, ?roffset : {float},
 ?rpower : {float}, ?rslope : {float},
 ?saturation : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • aoffset (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Offset of the alpha component.
  • apower (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Power (Gamma) of the alpha component.
  • aslope (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Slope of the alpha component.
  • boffset (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Offset of the blue color component.
  • bpower (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Power (Gamma) of the blue color component.
  • bslope (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Slope of the blue color component.
  • goffset (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Offset of the green color component.
  • gpower (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Power (Gamma) of the green color component.
  • gslope (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Slope of the green color component.
  • roffset (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Offset of the red color component.
  • rpower (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Power (Gamma) of the red color component.
  • rslope (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.05): Slope of the red color component.
  • saturation (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.1): Overall saturation.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.

  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

video.frei0r.spillsupress

Remove green or blue spill light from subjects shot in front of green or blue screen (by Janne Liljeblad).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?supresstype : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • supresstype (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Defines if green or blue screen spill suppress is applied.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.

  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

video.frei0r.squareblur

Variable-size square blur (by Drone).

 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

video.frei0r.test_pat_b

Generates test card lookalikes (by Marko Cebokli).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?aspect_type : {float},
 ?manual_aspect : {float}, ?type : {float}) ->
source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • aspect_type (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): 7 choices, pixel aspect ratio.
  • manual_aspect (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Manual pixel aspect ratio (Aspect type 6).
  • type (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): 8 choices, select test pattern.

video.frei0r.test_pat_g

Generates geometry test pattern images (by Marko Cebokli).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?aspect_type : {float},
 ?manual_aspect : {float}, ?negative : bool,
 ?size_1 : {float}, ?size_2 : {float}, ?type : {float}) ->
source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • manual_aspect (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Manual pixel aspect ratio.
  • negative (of type bool, which defaults to false): Polarity of image.
  • size_1 (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.28125): Size of major features.
  • size_2 (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.0625): Size of minor features.
  • type (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Type of test pattern.

video.frei0r.test_pat_i

Generates spatial impulse and step test patterns (by Marko Cebokli).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?amplitude : {float}, ?channel : {float},
 ?negative : bool, ?tilt : {float}, ?type : {float},
 ?width : {float}) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • amplitude (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.800000011921): Amplitude (contrast) of the pattern.
  • channel (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Into which color channel to draw.
  • negative (of type bool, which defaults to false): Change polarity of impulse/step.
  • tilt (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Angle of step function.
  • type (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Type of test pattern.
  • width (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.0404040403664): Width of impulse.

video.frei0r.test_pat_r

Generates resolution test patterns (by Marko Cebokli).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?amplitude : {float},
 ?aspect_type : {float}, ?channel : {float},
 ?freq_1 : {float}, ?freq_2 : {float}, ?lin_p_swp : bool,
 ?manual_aspect : {float}, ?type : {float}) ->
source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • amplitude (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.800000011921): Amplitude (contrast) of the pattern.
  • aspect_type (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Pixel aspect ratio presets.
  • channel (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Into which color channel to draw.
  • freq_1 (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.0299999993294): Pattern 7 H frequency.
  • freq_2 (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.0299999993294): Pattern 7 V frequency.
  • lin_p_swp (of type bool, which defaults to false): Use linear period sweep.
  • manual_aspect (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.5): Manual pixel aspect ratio.
  • type (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Type of test pattern.

video.frei0r.threshold0r

Thresholds a source image (by Jean-Sebastien Senecal).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?threshold : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • threshold (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): The threshold.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

video.frei0r.timeout_indicator

Timeout indicators e.g. for slides (by Simon A. Eugster).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?color : int, ?time : {float},
 ?transparency : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • color (of type int, which defaults to 0): Indicator colour.
  • time (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Current time.
  • transparency (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.): Indicator transparency.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.

  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

video.frei0r.tint0r

Tint a source image with specified color (by Maksim Golovkin).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?map_black_to : int, ?map_white_to : int,
 ?tint_amount : {float}, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • map_black_to (of type int, which defaults to 0): The color to map source color with null luminance.
  • map_white_to (of type int, which defaults to 8388479): The color to map source color with full luminance.
  • tint_amount (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.25): Amount of color.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c))

 source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) ->
source(audio='a, video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.

video.frei0r.white_balance

Do simple color correction, in a physically meaningful way (by Steinar H. Gunderson).

Type:

(?id : string?, ?color_temperature : {float},
 ?neutral_color : int, source(audio='a,
 video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)) -> source(audio='a,
video=yuva420p('b), midi='c)

Arguments:

  • id (of type string?, which defaults to null): Force the value of the source ID.
  • color_temperature (of type {float}, which defaults to 0.433333333333): Choose an output color temperature, if different from 6500 K..
  • neutral_color (of type int, which defaults to 8355711): Choose a color from the source image that should be white..

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.

Source / Visualization

String

System

Visualization

vumeter

VU meter: display the audio volume (RMS in dB).

Type:

(?rms_min : float, ?rms_max : float, ?window : float,
 ?scroll : bool, source(audio=pcm('a), video='b,
 midi='c)) -> source(audio=pcm('a), video='b, midi='c)

Arguments:

  • rms_min (of type float, which defaults to -25.): Minimal volume.
  • rms_max (of type float, which defaults to -5.): Maximal volume.
  • window (of type float, which defaults to 0.5): Duration in seconds of volume computation.
  • scroll (of type bool, which defaults to false): Update the display in the same line.
  • (unlabeled) (of type source(audio=pcm('a), video='b, midi='c))

Methods:

  • fallible (of type bool): Indicate if a source may fail, i.e. may not be ready to stream.
  • id (of type () -> string): Identifier of the source.
  • is_active (of type () -> bool): true if the source is active, i.e. it is continuously animated by its own clock whenever it is ready. Typically, true for outputs and sources such as input.http.
  • is_ready (of type () -> bool): Indicate if a source is ready to stream. This does not mean that the source is currently streaming, just that its resources are all properly initialized.
  • is_up (of type () -> bool): Indicate that the source can be asked to produce some data at any time. This is true when the source is currently being used or if it could be used at any time, typically inside a switch or fallback.
  • log (of type {level : (() -> int?).{set : ((int) -> unit)}}): Get or set the source’s log level, from 1 to 5.
  • on_leave (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source is not used anymore by another source.
  • on_metadata (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on metadata packets.
  • on_shutdown (of type ((() -> unit)) -> unit): Register a function to be called when source shuts down.
  • on_track (of type ((([string * string]) -> unit)) -> unit): Call a given handler on new tracks.
  • remaining (of type () -> float): Estimation of remaining time in the current track.
  • rms (of type () -> float): Current value for the RMS volume.
  • seek (of type (float) -> float): Seek forward, in seconds (returns the amount of time effectively seeked).
  • self_sync (of type () -> bool): Is the source currently controling its own real-time loop.
  • shutdown (of type () -> unit): Deactivate a source.
  • skip (of type () -> unit): Skip to the next track.
  • time (of type () -> float): Get a source’s time, based on its assigned clock.
